questions.question: What is symmetric key distribution? Explain its importance in secure communication.
keyPoints: Importance of symmetric key distribution in secure communication

keyPoints: Definition of the key exchange problem
How Kerberos solves the key exchange problem

questions.question: What is key pre-distribution? Explain its limitations.

keyPoints: Definition of the Key Distribution Center (KDC)

keyPoints: Definition of security considerations in symmetric key distribution
Explanation of how Kerberos addresses these considerations
